objective: Build a single-stock point-in-time data readiness pilot that separates adjusted price research data, raw daily price data, and current fundamental snapshots before any stock-level research model uses them.
forbidden: Do not use AkShare financial_indicator history for historical backtests without available_date.
Do not treat qfq prices without row-level available_date as PIT-safe adjusted-return labels.
Do not mix Tushare raw unadjusted daily prices with adjusted price return labels without explicit flags.
Do not make alpha, order, portfolio, or strategy-performance claims in this data intake task.
acceptance_criteria: All configured stocks are listed in the research universe.
Each source has coverage and PIT status records.
AkShare financial snapshots are blocked from historical backtests.
AkShare qfq prices are marked research-only until row-level availability is controlled.
Tushare raw daily rows with available_date are isolated as raw price-state data only.
Data gaps are recorded with owner and severity.
failure_conditions: Any fundamental snapshot is allowed into historical backtests without available_date.
Any qfq adjusted series is approved as PIT total-return label without available_date.
Any output claims a tradable stock strategy result.
quality_gates: Boundary audit exists and has no fail status.
Acceptance checks have no fail status.
